description: E2E Testing Infrastructure - Add admin panel tests, quantai/quantmail tests, and CI integration. The e2e/ directory already has extensive tests (auth, chat, mail, neon, etc.) and a playwright.config.ts at root. Wave 4 needs: admin dashboard/users specs and CI e2e job.
steps: Create e2e/tests/admin/dashboard.spec.ts - test that admin dashboard page loads, shows all app cards/tiles with status indicators, navigation sidebar works, overview stats are visible
Create e2e/tests/admin/users.spec.ts - test user list loads with table rows, search input filters results, role dropdown filters, pagination works
Create e2e/tests/quantai/ask.spec.ts - test ask page loads with input, submitting a question shows loading state then answer, conversation history appears
Create e2e/tests/quantmail/inbox.spec.ts - test inbox page loads, email list renders with sender/subject, clicking email opens detail view
Update .github/workflows/ci.yml to add an e2e job that runs after build, installs playwright browsers, and runs playwright test with appropriate sharding
acceptance_criteria: e2e/tests/admin/dashboard.spec.ts exists with 3+ meaningful test cases
e2e/tests/admin/users.spec.ts exists with 3+ meaningful test cases
e2e/tests/quantai/ask.spec.ts exists with 3+ meaningful test cases
e2e/tests/quantmail/inbox.spec.ts exists with 3+ meaningful test cases
.github/workflows/ci.yml contains an e2e job with playwright test
pnpm turbo typecheck passes (e2e uses its own tsconfig so just validate no syntax errors)
findings: All 133 typecheck and 112 lint tasks pass. The e2e package itself does not have typecheck/lint scripts so is not part of turbo pipeline for those tasks, but files are valid TS verified by pre-commit prettier hook. Existing e2e/tsconfig.json has a pre-existing TS2688 error for @types/node that does not affect any turbo tasks.
